mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO social.carbon_market_daily_kline ( trade_date, open_price, close_price, low_price, high_price, volume_tons, synced_at ) VALUES
( #{item.tradeDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.openPrice, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.closePrice, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.lowPrice, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.highPrice, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.volumeTons, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.syncedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIMEZONE} )
ON CONFLICT (trade_date) DO UPDATE SET open_price = EXCLUDED.open_price, close_price = EXCLUDED.close_price, low_price = EXCLUDED.low_price, high_price = EXCLUDED.high_price, volume_tons = EXCLUDED.volume_tons, synced_at = EXCLUDED.synced_at
